description: System supports real-time voice conversations with an AI tutor, accepting speech input and returning spoken AI responses without interrupting the user mid-turn.
Pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary feedback is delivered only after each complete user speaking turn, never during the turn.
After each speaking turn, the system provides a pronunciation coaching note identifying specific errors and suggesting corrections.
After each speaking turn, the system provides in-context grammar corrections with plain-language explanations and natural alternatives.
After each speaking turn, the system provides vocabulary coaching including suggestions for more natural or precise word choices.
On first use, the system assesses the user's English proficiency level and assigns them to Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.
The system generates and continuously updates a personalized lesson plan that adapts to the user's current proficiency and session history.
Conversation difficulty, vocabulary, and grammar complexity automatically adjust to match the user's current proficiency level and evolve as the user improves.
During onboarding, the user can select one or more learning goals (Daily Conversation, Business English, Travel, Job Interviews, Presentations, Exam Prep: IELTS/TOEFL).
The system offers structured speaking practice scenarios covering real-life situations including food ordering, travel, business meetings, job interviews, and presentations.
The system provides daily short practice challenges that contribute to a streak counter, encouraging consistent daily use.
The system tracks and displays the user's consecutive-day speaking streak, resetting if a day is missed.
The dashboard shows a daily speaking goal with a progress bar reflecting the user's practice completed vs. target for the current day.
The system computes and stores a cumulative pronunciation score per user, displayed on the dashboard and updated after each session.
The system computes and stores a grammar improvement score per user, displayed on the dashboard and updated over time.
The system tracks the count of vocabulary items learned and displays vocabulary growth on the dashboard.
The dashboard displays a list of words recently learned or corrected during practice sessions.
The dashboard includes a chart showing the user's learning activity and progress over the past week.
The dashboard surfaces upcoming or recommended practice sessions personalized to the user's plan and weak areas.
The dashboard presents AI-generated personalized insights and learning tips derived from the user's session history.
The dashboard shows the user's current assigned proficiency level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced).
The system awards and displays achievement badges when users hit defined milestones (e.g., streak length, sessions completed, score thresholds).
The system sends daily speaking practice reminder notifications to the user.
The system sends weekly learning summary notifications recapping progress.
The system detects periods of user inactivity and sends motivational nudge notifications to re-engage.
The system sends vocabulary review reminder notifications prompting the user to revisit previously learned words.
The system sends notifications suggesting targeted pronunciation practice based on areas of weakness.
The system sends notifications when the user reaches a progress milestone or earns an achievement badge.
The system sends notifications containing personalized exercises generated from the user's past mistakes.
Users can enable or disable each notification type individually and set frequency preferences; the system respects these settings.
The AI tutor is available at any time of day without scheduled downtime, supporting users across time zones.
All AI responses, feedback, and UI copy frame errors as learning opportunities; no negative or condescending language is used.
User profiles, progress, scores, streaks, learned words, and preferences persist across sessions and devices.
Users must authenticate (sign up / log in) to access personalized features, progress data, and notifications.
The system stores per-session transcripts or summaries sufficient to power adaptive learning, personalized exercises, and AI insights.
The app requests and gracefully handles microphone permissions, providing clear guidance if access is denied.
User speech is transcribed with sufficient accuracy to enable meaningful grammar and pronunciation analysis.
AI tutor responses are delivered as natural-sounding synthesized speech, not text-only output.
AI voice responses are returned with low enough latency to maintain a natural conversational flow (target: under 3 seconds per turn).
UI uses primary color Indigo #6366F1, Plus Jakarta Sans for headings, and Inter for body text throughout.
The application is usable on mobile browsers and/or native mobile form factors, given the on-the-go learner audience.
Voice recordings and user learning data are handled in compliance with applicable privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, COPPA where relevant); users can delete their data.
Speaking streak resets to zero when the user fails to complete at least one practice session on a given calendar day.
The system maintains a content library of practice scenarios covering at minimum the six stated domains (food ordering, travel, business, job interviews, presentations, exam prep).
The system can promote or adjust a user's proficiency level (Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced) as their scores and performance improve over time.
